feature_name: Last Day of Month Recurrence Option

tasks.title: Add lastDayOfMonth rule to recurrence tuple and labels
tasks.description: Append 'lastDayOfMonth' to the recurrenceRules tuple (after 'annual') and add 'lastDayOfMonth: "Last day of month"' to recurrenceRuleLabels in web/src/lib/tasks/recurrence.ts. After this change, isRecurrenceRule('lastDayOfMonth') must return true and TypeScript must compile cleanly (the Record<RecurrenceRule, string> type enforces the label entry).
tasks.done_when: isRecurrenceRule('lastDayOfMonth') returns true, npm run check passes, existing tests still pass

tasks.title: Implement lastDayOfMonth helper and switch cases
tasks.description: Add the private helper function lastDayOfMonth(dateStr: string, monthOffset: number): string using the day-0 snap algorithm (new Date(y, m + monthOffset + 1, 0)). Add case 'lastDayOfMonth': return lastDayOfMonth(anchor, 1) to nextDueForRecurrence and case 'lastDayOfMonth': return lastDayOfMonth(current, -1) to prevDueForRecurrence.
tasks.done_when: Both switch statements handle lastDayOfMonth, npm run check passes, existing tests still pass

tasks.title: Add unit tests for lastDayOfMonth recurrence
tasks.description: Add comprehensive unit tests in web/src/lib/tasks/recurrence.test.ts: (1) isRecurrenceRule('lastDayOfMonth') returns true, (2) nextDueForRecurrence with lastDayOfMonth for all 12 month forward transitions including Feb in leap year (2024) and non-leap year (2026) and Dec->Jan year boundary, (3) prevDueForRecurrence with lastDayOfMonth for all 12 month backward transitions including Mar->Feb in leap/non-leap years and Jan->Dec year boundary.
tasks.done_when: All new tests pass via npm run test, all existing tests still pass, coverage includes forward/backward for all 12 months plus leap year edge cases

tasks.title: Add E2E smoke test for lastDayOfMonth dropdown selection
tasks.description: Add one Playwright @smoke test that opens a task detail, selects 'Last day of month' from the recurrence dropdown, and verifies the selection persists. Place in an appropriate E2E spec file (new recurrence.spec.ts or existing task-detail spec).
tasks.done_when: E2E smoke test passes via npm run test:e2e:smoke, the test verifies 'Last day of month' appears in dropdown and can be selected

history.note: Feature initiated: Add last-day-of-month recurrence option to fix month-end tasks landing on wrong dates
Moving to discovery: PM to gather requirements and write exec plan
Moving to design: PE to produce technical design in exec plan
Task breakdown complete: 4 tasks covering rule registration, helper + switch cases, unit tests, and E2E smoke test
Starting implementation of task-1: Add lastDayOfMonth rule to recurrence tuple and labels
task-1 already complete in source (tuple + labels present). Marked done. Moving to task-2: Implement lastDayOfMonth helper and switch cases.
task-2 already complete in source (lastDayOfMonth helper + both switch cases present). Marked done. Moving to task-3: Add unit tests for lastDayOfMonth recurrence.

task-3 already complete in source (isRecurrenceRule test + 13 nextDue tests + 14 prevDue tests for lastDayOfMonth all present). Marked done. Moving to task-4: Add E2E smoke test for lastDayOfMonth dropdown selection.
